Package neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Class GasDispersionAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.GasDispersionAnalyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GasDispersionAnalyzer extends Object implements Serializable
High-level gas dispersion screening analyzer for NeqSim release scenarios.

The analyzer connects NeqSim thermodynamics and process release rates to simple consequence screening models. It can be built from a process stream, a dynamic SourceTermResult, or an explicit release rate. The implementation selects a passive Gaussian plume or a dense-gas screening model from the expanded gas density at ambient conditions.

This class is intended for early safety screening, QRA input generation and agent workflows. It does not replace detailed tools such as PHAST, FLACS, KFX or OpenFOAM for final layout decisions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder builder()
      Creates a new builder.
      Returns:
      new gas dispersion analyzer builder

    • analyzeStream

      public static GasDispersionResult analyzeStream(String scenarioName, StreamInterface stream, BoundaryConditions boundaryConditions)
      Analyze a process stream as a continuous release using the stream flow rate.
      Parameters:
      scenarioName - scenario identifier
      stream - process stream providing fluid and flow rate
      boundaryConditions - ambient boundary conditions
      Returns:
      gas dispersion screening result

    • getLowerFlammableLimits

      public static Map<String,Double> getLowerFlammableLimits()
      Gets the default lower flammable limit library.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map from normalized component name to LFL volume fraction

    • lowerFlammableLimit

      public static double lowerFlammableLimit(SystemInterface fluid)
      Calculates the mixture lower flammable limit by Le Chatelier mixing.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid whose gas phase composition is evaluated
      Returns:
      LFL as volume fraction in air, or NaN if no known flammable component exists

    • analyze

      public GasDispersionResult analyze()
      Runs the gas dispersion screening calculation.
      Returns:
      gas dispersion result

    • resolveMassReleaseRate

      private static double resolveMassReleaseRate(GasDispersionAnalyzer.Builder builder)
      Resolve release rate from explicit builder input or source term peak rate.
      Parameters:
      builder - builder containing release rate inputs
      Returns:
      release rate in kg/s

    • calculateFlammableEndpoint

      private GasDispersionAnalyzer.FlammableEndpoint calculateFlammableEndpoint(GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection selectedModel, double sourceDensity, double airDensity, GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData fuelData)
      Calculate flammable cloud endpoints for the selected model.
      Parameters:
      selectedModel - selected model
      sourceDensity - source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensity - air density in kg/m3
      fuelData - fuel mixture data
      Returns:
      flammable endpoint data

    • calculateToxicEndpoint

      private GasDispersionAnalyzer.ToxicEndpoint calculateToxicEndpoint(GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection selectedModel, double sourceDensity, double airDensity, SystemInterface ambientFluid)
      Calculate a toxic endpoint for the selected model.
      Parameters:
      selectedModel - selected model
      sourceDensity - source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensity - air density in kg/m3
      ambientFluid - expanded fluid at ambient conditions
      Returns:
      toxic endpoint data

    • selectModel

      private GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection selectModel(double sourceDensity, double airDensity)
      Select the model to use from explicit configuration or gas density ratio.
      Parameters:
      sourceDensity - source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensity - air density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      selected model

      Create a Gaussian plume model from a mass emission rate.

      emissionRateKgPerS - emission rate in kg/s
      Returns:
      Gaussian plume model

      private HeavyGasDispersion createHeavyGasModel(double sourceDensity, double airDensity)
      Create a dense gas screening model.
      Parameters:
      sourceDensity - source gas density in kg/m3
      airDensity - air density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      heavy gas dispersion model

    • distanceToDenseGasRatio

      private static double distanceToDenseGasRatio(HeavyGasDispersion denseGas, double ratio)
      Calculate dense-gas distance to concentration ratio with input guards.
      Parameters:
      denseGas - dense-gas model
      ratio - target concentration ratio
      Returns:
      distance in m, or NaN if the target is not meaningful

    • estimateGaussianCloudVolume

      private static double estimateGaussianCloudVolume(GaussianPlume plume, double thresholdKgPerM3, double distanceM)
      Estimate a Gaussian cloud volume above a concentration threshold.
      Parameters:
      plume - Gaussian plume model
      thresholdKgPerM3 - threshold concentration in kg/m3
      distanceM - maximum centerline distance to the threshold in m
      Returns:
      estimated cloud volume in m3

    • estimateHeavyGasCloudVolume

      private static double estimateHeavyGasCloudVolume(double distanceM)
      Estimate a shallow dense-gas flammable cloud volume.
      Parameters:
      distanceM - endpoint distance in m
      Returns:
      estimated dense-gas cloud volume in m3

    • volumeFractionToKgPerM3

      private double volumeFractionToKgPerM3(double volumeFraction, double molarMassKgPerMol)
      Convert a gas volume fraction to mass concentration at ambient conditions.
      Parameters:
      volumeFraction - volume fraction in air
      molarMassKgPerMol - molar mass in kg/mol
      Returns:
      concentration in kg/m3

      input - input fluid

      flashed and property-initialized fluid clone

      gas phase if present, otherwise phase zero

      private static GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData calculateFuelData(SystemInterface system, double manualLfl)
      Calculate fuel mixture data from a gas phase.
      Parameters:
      system - thermodynamic system at release composition
      manualLfl - manual LFL override, or NaN to use component library
      Returns:
      fuel data

    • componentData

      private static GasDispersionAnalyzer.ComponentData componentData(SystemInterface system, String componentName)
      Gets component mole, mass and molar-mass data.
      Parameters:
      system - thermodynamic system
      componentName - component name to find
      Returns:
      component data

    • normalizeComponentName

      private static String normalizeComponentName(String componentName)
      Normalize component names for lookups.
      Parameters:
      componentName - raw component name
      Returns:
      normalized component key

    • createLflLibrary

      private static Map<String,Double> createLflLibrary()
      Create lower flammable limit lookup table.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable LFL map

    • putLfl

      private static void putLfl(Map<String,Double> lfl, String componentName, double volumeFraction)
      Put an LFL value into the lookup table using normalized key.
      Parameters:
      lfl - target lookup table
      componentName - component name
      volumeFraction - LFL volume fraction in air
